flow_points: Netherlands started by scoring 50 runs for 2 wickets in the Powerplay (RR: 8.33).
Pakistan responded with an aggressive Powerplay, scoring 61 runs for 2 wickets (RR: 10.17).
Salman Mirza delivered a crucial spell, taking 3 wickets for 25 runs in 3.5 overs, sustaining defensive pressure with an impact score of 112.62.
PA van Meekeren also bowled a crucial spell, taking 2 wickets for 20 runs from 4 overs.
Abrar Ahmed contributed with 2 wickets for 23 runs across his 4 overs.
RE van der Merwe added pressure, securing 1 wicket while conceding only 13 runs in 3 overs.
Faheem Ashraf anchored Pakistan's chase, contributing 19.6% of the team's runs.
Pakistan successfully secured victory by 3 wickets.
